hero.title: Join Our Mission
hero.subtitle: Help preserve and share ancient wisdom with the world

about.title: Why Work With Us?
about.subtitle: Be part of a mission that matters
about.content: At Shikshanam, we're not just building a company – we're preserving and sharing the timeless wisdom of our ancestors. Join a team that's passionate about making ancient knowledge accessible to modern learners worldwide.

benefits.title: Meaningful Mission
benefits.description: Work on something that truly matters – preserving and sharing ancient wisdom

benefits.title: Personal Growth
benefits.description: Learn from ancient teachings while building your career

benefits.title: Global Impact
benefits.description: Help thousands of learners worldwide discover ancient wisdom

benefits.title: Inclusive Culture
benefits.description: Work in a diverse, supportive environment that values different perspectives

positions.title: Open Positions
positions.subtitle: Find your perfect role in our mission

jobs.title: Sanskrit Language Instructor
jobs.description: Teach Sanskrit language and literature to students of all levels. Help develop curriculum and create engaging learning experiences.
requirements: Master's degree in Sanskrit or related field

jobs.title: Educational Content Developer
jobs.description: Create engaging educational content about Indian philosophy, meditation, and ancient wisdom traditions.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Philosophy, Education, or related field
Knowledge of Indian philosophy and traditions

jobs.title: Technology Lead
jobs.description: Lead our technology initiatives to make ancient wisdom accessible through modern platforms.
requirements: Experience with React, Node.js, and modern web technologies

steps.title: Browse Open Positions
steps.description: Review our current job openings and find the role that matches your skills and interests

steps.title: Submit Your Application
steps.description: Send us your resume and cover letter explaining why you want to join our mission

steps.title: Interview Process
steps.description: We'll schedule interviews to get to know you and discuss how you can contribute to our mission

steps.title: Welcome to the Team
steps.description: If selected, you'll join our passionate team working to preserve and share ancient wisdom

contact.title: Questions?
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.message: Have questions about our positions or want to learn more about working with us? Don't hesitate to reach out!
